The [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]] '''Nebulon-S Racer''' or simply '''S-swoop''' was 3.2 meters long. It could achieve 600 kilometers per hour. It had 1 blaster cannon.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|6|Swoop Gangs|reprint=1}}
